category_title: Conscientious ELL student who views reading as a practical tool
scenario_title: Managing heavy homework loads and large packets
minimal_context: The student is looking at a daily large packet for his physical science class that he needs to complete outside of the classroom.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Here is the daily large packet for physical science that you need to complete outside of the classroom.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I am willing to put forth the effort required, even if it challenges me.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Okay, go ahead and start working on it.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: But this is a lot of work to do outside of the classroom.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just keep trying to get through the pages.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I am really frustrated with teachers who assign a lot of work outside of the classroom. I often fail the classes in which too much work is assigned.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Here is the daily large packet for physical science that you need to complete outside of the classroom.

STUDENT: I am willing to put forth the effort required, even if it challenges me.

TUTOR: Okay, go ahead and start working on it.

STUDENT: But this is a lot of work to do outside of the classroom.

TUTOR: Just keep trying to get through the pages.

STUDENT: I am really frustrated with teachers who assign a lot of work outside of the classroom. I often fail the classes in which too much work is assigned.

task.content: Completing daily large packets of work outside of the classroom

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When teachers assigned a lot of work outside of the classroom
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Expressed frustration and often failed the classes in which too much work was assigned

behavior_patterns.condition: When assigned a lot of work outside of the classroom
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Often failed the classes in which too much work was assigned
